title: Dairy Business Innovation Act of 2025
plain_summary: The Dairy Business Innovation Act of 2025 gives more money to programs that help dairy businesses. These programs help dairy companies make, sell, and deliver their products better. The bill increases funding from twenty million dollars to thirty-six million dollars each year. The programs help with all kinds of dairy products made from cow, sheep, and goat milk, including special niche products.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Dairy Business Innovation Act of two thousand twenty-five.

sections.title: Section 2 Dairy Business Innovation Initiatives
sections.text: This section changes an existing law called the Agriculture Improvement Act of two thousand eighteen. The change increases the amount of money available for dairy business innovation programs from twenty million dollars to thirty-six million dollars.
